title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package that adds Ollama as a native LLM provider in LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface, model manager, multi-user).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper that adds chat history, prompt templates, and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models inline as GitHub-Copilot-style suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with builders, streaming, and embedding helpers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple idiomatic client with async support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models for generative & embedding pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET SDK with strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack adding Nginx, GPU support, WebUI, and monitoring.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Curated library of Modelfiles for Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, Phi, etc., maintained by Ollama.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats, generates code, and switches models on the fly.
